description.ko: 에메랄드빛 이끼와 황금빛 액체 조명이 고요한 수중 분위기 속에서 만나는 우주적 규모의 유기적 호흡 시스템을 장엄하게 시각화한 작품입니다.
description.en: A majestic visualization of a cosmic-scale organic breathing system, where emerald moss meets golden liquid light in a serene underwater atmosphere.

prompt: An ultra-detailed cinematic 3D render of AURA-7, titled 'The Alveolar Nebula.' A gargantuan, breathing organic lung structure composed of #7FB069 emerald moss membranes and deep #2D5A3D vascular networks. The entity is suspended in a weightless #E6F2E1 pearlescent liquid atmosphere. Thick, viscous ribbons of #FFE66D golden bioluminescent nectar pulse through the translucent walls, drifting like liquid silk into the void. Macro focus on the semi-permeable cellular textures and internal capillary systems. Rendered in Octane with hyper-realistic fluid dynamics, volumetric light shafts, and extreme soft focus bokeh. 8k resolution.
